title: Niche playbook: hero-mood-mapping
description: Maps brand-dna.hero.mood values to lighting briefs the Gemini Image API uses at Stage 9. Every niche ships at minimum the five universal moods; niches add niche-specific moods (e.g. candlelit_intimate for hospitality, storm_dramatic for storm-restoration contractors).

defaultMood.description: Mood used when brand-dna.hero.mood is not set. Must match a key in `moods`.

lightingBrief.description: Plain-language lighting description sent to Gemini Image. Example: "Warm directional light from low angle, long soft shadows, saturated golden tones."

moods.description: Mood-name → lighting-brief object. Universal moods all niches typically ship: golden_hour_warm, overcast_calm, dramatic_dusk, bright_midday_clean, dawn_soft_optimistic.

regionalOverrides.description: Optional list of region → default-mood overrides. Example: tropical niche regions default to bright_midday_clean.
